metadata.page_title: Cadian Shock Troops Army List v1.55
metadata.status_note: Filename says v1.56, visible PDF title says v1.55

entries.scope: All formations except Reaver and Warlord Titan formations and Whiteshield Companies

special_rules.name: Dedicated War Engines
special_rules.text: Leviathans and Stormlords may only transport units from their own formation. The rules for War Engine transports do not apply to them when using the Cadian Shock Troops army list.

special_rules.name: Commissars
special_rules.text:
An Imperial Guard army may include one Commissar character per 500 points, or part thereof, in the army. The Commissars do not cost any points.
Commissar units may be added to the army at the start of the battle before either side sets up. If the army includes a Supreme Commander than the first Commissar must be attached to the Supreme Commander's formation. Any further Commissars may be attached to any other formations.
You may not include more than one Commissar per formation. You may not add a Commissar to an Imperial Ally formation. If you have more Commissars than formations any excess is lost.

special_rules.name: Imperial Void Shields
special_rules.text:
Imperial Titans are protected by void shield generators. The number of void shields each Titan has is noted on the Titan's datasheet. Each void shield will automatically stop one point of damage and then go down. Do not make armour saves for damage stopped by void shields, nor allocate Blast markers. Once all of the shields have been knocked down, the Titan may be damaged normally and you may make saving throws against any hits that are scored. Hits from close combat ignore void shields but units using their firefight values must first knock down any shields before they can damage the Titan.
Void shields that have been knocked down can be repaired. Each Titan can repair one downed void shield in the end phase of each turn. In addition, if a Titan regroups it can use the dice roll to either repair the void shield or remove Blast markers (e.g., if you rolled a 2 you could repair 2 shields, remove 2 Blast markers or repair 1 shield and remove 1 Blast marker).

profiles.name: Infantry
abilities_or_notes: One unit in every two has an Autocannon.

profiles.name: Chimera
abilities_or_notes: May transport two infantry units without Jump Packs or Mounted.

profiles.name: Valkyrie
abilities_or_notes: May transport two infantry units without Jump Packs or Mounted.

profiles.name: Baneblade
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: Destroyed. All units within 5cm of the model suffer a hit on a roll of 6+.

profiles.name: Leviathan Mobile Command Center
abilities_or_notes: Up to six units may Fire and FF from the fighting platform.
Critical Hit Effect: 1st hit immobilizes, subsequent critical hits do 1 extra point of damage.

profiles.name: Ordinatus Cadia
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: Destroyed, units within 15cm are hit on a 4+. All friendly formations within LOS takes a BM.

profiles.name: Reaver Class Titan
abilities_or_notes: May step over units and pieces of terrain that are lower than the unit's knees and less than 2cm wide.

Critical Hit Effect: The unit's plasma reactor has been breached. Roll a D6 for each breach on the unit in the end phase of each turn. On a roll of 1 the unit is destroyed and all units within 5cm suffer a hit on a roll of 5+, and on a roll of 4-6 the breach has been repaired. Any breach not repaired causes one point of damage.

profiles.name: Shadowsword
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: Destroyed. All units within 5cm of the model suffer a hit on a roll of 6+.

profiles.name: Stormlord
abilities_or_notes: 4 units may Fire and FF from the fighting platform.
Critical Hit Effect: Destroyed. All units within 5cm of the model suffer a hit on a roll of 6+.

profiles.name: Stormsword
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: Destroyed. All units within 5cm of the model suffer a hit on a roll of 6+.

profiles.name: Warlord Class Titan
abilities_or_notes: May step over units and pieces of terrain that are lower than the unit's knees and less than 2cm wide.

Critical Hit Effect: The unit's plasma reactor has been breached. Roll a D6 for each breach on the unit in the end phase of each turn. On a roll of 1 the unit is destroyed and all units within 5cm suffer a hit on a roll of 4+, and on a roll of 4-6 the breach has been repaired. Any breach not repaired causes one point of damage.

army_notes.name: Company Upgrades
army_notes.text: Up to three company upgrades may be taken once per company.

army_notes.name: Support Formations
army_notes.text: Any two support formations may be fielded per each company.

army_notes.name: Imperial Ally Formations
army_notes.text: Up to a third of the points available may be spent on these formations.

army_notes.name: Cadian Shock Troops Companies
army_notes.text: Whiteshield Companies in this list have Initiative 3+.
